prompt: Ultra-realistic DSLR portrait of a beautiful young East Asian woman sitting outdoors beneath a blooming tree during golden hour, looking back over her shoulder directly at the camera with a calm, dreamy expression. She has long, naturally wavy dark brown hair cascading over her back, with a small vibrant red flower tucked behind one ear. She wears elegant gold oval drop earrings and an oversized off-shoulder deep crimson red knit sweater exposing one shoulder. One hand gently brushes through her hair while the other rests naturally out of frame. Warm golden sunlight creates soft glowing skin with subtle specular highlights and natural rim light around her hair. Background filled with large flowering trees, warm autumn foliage, creamy bokeh, and a softly blurred park pathway. Rich cinematic color grading with warm reds and earthy browns, shallow depth of field, ultra-detailed skin texture, realistic hair strands, natural makeup, soft peach lips, sharp eyes with catchlights, HDR photography, 85mm lens, f/1.8, RAW photo, masterpiece, ultra photorealistic, 8K. Ultra-realistic outdoor portrait of a beautiful young East Asian woman photographed from a slightly low-angle perspective beneath a flowering tree on a bright sunny day. She tilts her head gently toward the camera while making soft eye contact with a relaxed, elegant smile. Long voluminous dark brown wavy hair flows naturally over her shoulders, adorned with a small vivid red flower near one ear. She wears delicate gold oval drop earrings and a loose off-shoulder deep crimson red knit sweater. Natural tree leaves cast beautiful dappled shadows across her face and sweater, creating artistic sunlight patterns. Bright blue sky with fluffy white clouds and flowering tree branches fill the background, rendered with soft creamy bokeh. Argentina Warm cinematic lighting, luminous skin, subtle glow, realistic facial details, glossy lips, detailed eyes with natural catchlights, shallow depth of field, HDR, 85mm portrait lens, f/2.0, professional fashion photography, RAW, ultra photorealistic, masterpiece quality, 8K.

promptZh: 超写实 DSLR 肖像，一位美丽的年轻东亚女性坐在盛开的树下，正值黄金时刻，她回眸直视镜头，表情平静而梦幻。她留着长长的自然波浪深棕色卷发，垂落在背部，耳后别着一朵鲜艳的小红花。她佩戴着优雅的金色椭圆形耳坠，身穿一件超大款露肩深绯红色针织毛衣，露出一侧肩膀。一只手轻轻拨弄头发，另一只手自然地放在画面外。温暖的金色阳光勾勒出柔和发光的皮肤，带有细腻的镜面高光，头发周围有自然的轮廓光。背景中满是高大的开花树木、温暖的秋叶、奶油般的焦外成像以及柔和模糊的公园小径。丰富的电影级调色，带有温暖的红色和大地棕色，浅景深，超精细的皮肤纹理，逼真的发丝，自然妆容，柔和的桃色嘴唇，带有眼神光的锐利双眼，HDR 摄影，85mm 镜头，f/1.8，RAW 照片，杰作，超写实，8K。超写实户外肖像，一位美丽的年轻东亚女性在明媚的晴天里，于开花树下以略微低角度拍摄。她轻轻向镜头倾斜头部，眼神柔和地接触，带着放松而优雅的微笑。长而蓬松的深棕色波浪卷发自然地垂在肩上，耳边装饰着一朵鲜艳的小红花。她佩戴着精致的金色椭圆形耳坠，身穿一件宽松的露肩深绯红色针织毛衣。天然的树叶在她的脸庞和毛衣上投下美丽的斑驳阴影，营造出艺术感的光影图案。明亮的蓝天、蓬松的白云和开花的树枝填满了背景，呈现出柔和的奶油般焦外成像效果。阿根廷温暖的电影级照明，发光的皮肤，细腻的光泽，逼真的面部细节，光泽感双唇，带有自然眼神光的细节双眼，浅景深，HDR，85mm 肖像镜头，f/2.0，专业时尚摄影，RAW，超写实，杰作级品质，8K。
